title: 5 Pcs Mini Metal Cosmetic Spatulas Makeup Cream Spoon Skincare Spatula Silver Dig Scoop Practical Beauty Accessories for Mixing and Sampling Makeup Cosmetic Beauty Tools
description:
About this item
【Material】These facial cream spatulas are made of quality stainless steel, with a smooth surface, not easy to bend or break, washable, and reusable.
【Easy to Clean】Tiny cosmetic spatula spoons can be cleaned with water and paper towels or with wet wipes, making it easy to clean quickly.
【Essential Cosmetic Tool】The small makeup spatula is perfect for scooping out small amounts of product from jars or pots, allowing you to maximize the usage of your favorite cosmetics without wasting any product.
【Perfect for Skincare】The skincare spatula is designed to scoop and apply creams, lotions, and serums hygienically, reducing the risk of contamination and ensuring precise application for optimal results.
【Portable Size】Mini makeup spatula size is 2.56" x 0.59"/6.5cm x 1.5cm, compact and lightweight, you can easily take it in bags on travel, easy to store and carry.
reviews_5s: I had been looking for these in plastic and then came across these metal ones! They’re great and the perfect size!Got this to scoop out home made toothpaste. It works
reviews_1s:
I wouldn’t use these for skin care products nor anything going into my mouth.

These are unfortunately, no different than the other similar products sold on Amazon that are made of unknown metals and coated with unknown compounds.

Unknown metal: will rust, tarnish, leach into and likely deactivate chemicals in products. They’re definitely not stainless steel (magnet tested); and
Too thin and flat to pick up without sliding it across and off the edge of the counter to get a grip on it (adding more bacteria).

Will look for a quality true stainless steel baby spoon at a large department store and use it instead. Unfortunately, even a lot of those sold on Amazon are from China and, not true and food grade stainless steel.
